## Why It Works

The hook and flip does most of the work. It takes a common theme amongst entrepreneurs (winning) and gives the impression that it's not the right thing to think about simply by how it's written in the first line. Then it shifts people's perspective from the outcome to the journey very quickly and very clearly.

## Template

So many [PERSON] talk about [TRENDY OUTCOME].
In my opinion, you never [REACH TRENDY OUTCOME].
You simply [REALISTIC JOURNEY].

## Example

So many [PERSON] talk about [TRENDY OUTCOME].
In my opinion, you never [REACH TRENDY OUTCOME].
You simply [REALISTIC JOURNEY].
